ham.subject: Your Upcoming Flight Itinerary – Confirmation and Details
ham.body:
Dear Alex Johnson,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. We are pleased to confirm your flight itinerary:

• Flight: SH1234
• Date: 15 June 2026
• Departure: 08:45 AM from JFK International Airport (New York)
• Arrival: 11:15 AM at LAX (Los Angeles)
• Class: Business
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Baggage: 1 carry‑on + 2 checked bags (up to 23 kg each)

Please arrive at the departure gate at least 45 minutes before departure. Your boarding pass is attached to this email in PDF format. If you need to change any details or have special requests (dietary, wheelchair assistance, etc.), reply to this email or call our customer service at 1‑800‑SKYHIGH.

We look forward to serving you and wish you a pleasant journey.

Best regards,

SkyHigh Airlines
Customer Relations
support@skyhigh.com
1‑800‑SKYHIGH

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Crypto Wallet Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

Our security team has detected unusual activity on your CryptoWallet account (ID: 987654321). As a precaution, we have temporarily suspended all transactions to protect your assets.

To restore full access, you must verify your identity within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so may result in permanent account suspension.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process:

<URL>

If you do not verify within the allotted time, your wallet will remain locked and you will lose the ability to withdraw funds.

We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

CryptoExchange Support Team
Security Operations
support@cryptoexchange.com
